title: Cabbirrada Warshadaha
gapGrossMargin: Kordhi faa'iidada guud {gap}pp iyada oo lala xaajoonayo alaab-qeybiyayaal wanaagsan, la yarayo qashinka, ama dib loo qiimeeyo
gapNetMargin: Xir farqiga {gap}pp ee faa'iidada saafiga ah adigoo yaraynaya kharashaadka ROI-hooseeya ama hagaajinaya qiimaynta
gapOpexRatio: Yaree kharashaadka hawlgalka {gap}pp dakhliga iyada oo la isticmaalayo otomaatig ama dib-u-xaajayn kharashaadka go'an
gapInventoryTurnover: Kordhi wareegga {gap}x iyada oo la qorsheeyo dalabka si wanaagsan oo la yarayo kaydka gaabis ah
gapFallback: Xir farqiga si aad u gaarto celceliska warshadda
askPrompt: Barbardhig ganacsigayga cabbirrada {industry}. Tiradaydu waa: Faa'iidada guud {grossMargin}% (warshadda {gmLow}-{gmHigh}%), Faa'iidada saafiga ah {netMargin}% (warshadda {nmLow}-{nmHigh}%), Saamiga OpEx {opexRatio}% (warshadda {opexLow}-{opexHigh}%). {gapSuffix} Waa maxay ficillada gaarka ah ee aan qaadan lahaa si aan u gaaro rubuciga sare?
